transformationMoves: Replace diagnostic shorthand with bodily proof, nearby objects, and terrain pressure before a character names the pattern.
Swap generic cold-weather or fortification language for sourced Northrend specifics such as Dragonblight debris, ice-block fortification, forge heat, and Frostmourne threshold text.
Keep magical explanation pinned to hand movement, cup rims, spilled ale, breath, leather, frost, and other contact-level carriers.
Revise locally and keep cadence lean so the chapter stays breakneck instead of turning explanatory.

scenes.title: The March
scenes.biggestGap: Jaina's magical read still occasionally resolves into abstract diagnosis instead of body, spoor, and ground.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Dragonblight's dead-white interior, the bent spoor at the bluffs, and the first defensible rise holding Muradin's camp.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Flask seam biting skin, crust breaking under boots, exposed dragon bone, abandoned gear in ice, and the ice-block wall ahead.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas tracks formation discipline, exhaustion, and whether the land is stripping the chase down faster than they can pay for it.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Jaina's lines stay attached to swallowing, breath catches, visible spoor bends, and her hand listening toward the bluffs.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Smoke and the ugly dwarven gate turn the march from attrition into local intelligence.

scenes.title: The Ally
scenes.biggestGap: The Frostmourne briefing threatens to drift into neat conceptual phrasing unless it keeps scraping against table grain, ale, and Muradin's physical room-read.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Muradin's siege-worn shelter inside the camp's ice-block perimeter, with the glacier route governing every spoken minute.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Boiling ale, brazier heat, rough boards, wet ale trail, beard-rings clicking, and the gear readied for immediate departure.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas judges Muradin by camp discipline, bluntness, and whether his intelligence changes the arithmetic of catching Arthas.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Briefing lines stay anchored to cups, table surfaces, fingers in spilled ale, and the rangers standing the walls.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The room ends in gloves, route count, and a departure too urgent for meal or rest.

scenes.title: Frostmourne
scenes.biggestGap: Threshold warning and seam discovery both need one more layer of physical proof so the cave climax stays world-bound through the retreat.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: The glacier seam, the cave mouth, the narrowed throat, and the cathedral-scale chamber beyond.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Half-scoured runes, rimed hammer leather, rigid bow leather, ice shards, Muradin's blood at the mail seam, and straps carving palms on the carry.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads kill-lanes, failed lethality, and the exact instant the assault becomes extraction.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Threshold and retreat dialogue stays attached to runes, impact, barrier behavior, breath, and Jaina's fingers tracing the crooked throw.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: All seven come out; Light's Vengeance stays in the drift; Jaina keeps working the hitch on the run downhill.
